action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Analysis: Need baseline with minimal iteration time. Decision: Use pretrained ResNet-50, resize images to 224x224, class-weighted CE for imbalance, 5 epochs. Submit eval immediately after training to measure performance and time.
